**(Video opens with an energetic, modern graphic. Creator is direct to camera, smiling, high energy but calm.)**

Alright team, quick market vibe check!

Today, the major stocks took a little breather. SPY dipped almost 1%, and Nasdaq, with all its tech, took a slightly bigger hit, down 1.5%. Think of it as a tiny speed bump. Nothing to lose sleep over for your long-term bag.

And XRP? It barely blinked, down just 0.01%. Practically flat.

So, today's vibe? Just a little cool-down. Markets ebb and flow. Stay calm, stay stacking.
